sales.description:
LEO V with CONSTANTINE, 813-820. AV Solidus (4.43 gms), Constantinople Mint. NGC AU, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 3/5. Edge Marks, Brushed.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
S-1627. Obverse: Facing bust of Leo V, with slight beard, wearing crown and chlamys, holding globus cruciger and akakia; Reverse: Facing bust of Constantine, wearing chlamys, holding globus cruciger and akakia. A rather RARE type, and our first offering of this Sear number in recent decades, this...
